items.title: Mental Health Coloring Page (Some Days This Is Enough)
items.description: If all you did today was exist… that counts. Printable goblin-style coloring page for hard days, burnout, and quiet survival wins.

items.title: Burnout Recovery Printable (Low Energy Days Count)
items.description: For the days when doing nothing was actually doing everything. Relatable goblin-core printable for burnout, exhaustion, and slow recovery.

items.title: Goblin Core Affirmation Coloring Page (Soft but Real)
items.description: Not toxic positivity. Just real survival energy. Cozy goblin-core affirmation printable for people doing their best in messy ways.

items.title: Depression Support Coloring Page (You’re Still Here)
items.description: Existing is not nothing. This printable coloring page is for the days when everything feels heavy but you’re still here anyway.

items.title: Motivational Quote Printable (But Actually Honest)
items.description: Not “rise and grind.” More like “you survived and that counts.” A realistic motivational printable for people tired of fake positivity.
